# UiPath.ConnectionClient

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

- [2.0.14](2.0.14.json)
- [2.0.9](2.0.9.json)
- [2.0.7](2.0.7.json)
- [2.0.4](2.0.4.json)

- [1.4.2](1.4.2.json)
- [1.3.0](1.3.0.json)
- [1.1.2](1.1.2.json)
